title: Shot Diagram Keyboard Frame-Loader Repair
notes: Fixes the actual Shot Diagram Physical Keyboard failure: the m39.6.2 wrapper was still loading the original m39.6 helper inside the Shot Diagram iframe.
The Shot Diagram iframe now loads mithril-menu-m3963.js, so the current readonly, focus, click, and keyboard repairs run in the document that contains the hole-entry fields.
The frame loader now identifies its release and removes a stale child loader before attaching the current helper.
The Shot Diagram header should now display m39.6.3 rather than m39.6 when the current helper is active inside the iframe.
Number-row and numpad entry, A/D load entry, Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter Save + Next, Ctrl+Enter Save & Close, and the Keyboard Mode indicator remain included.
Touch Keypad mode and every m39.5/m39.6 pattern, shot-volume, PDF, load, selection, GPS, condition, backup, theme, and offline feature remain included.
